spec.name: execute_powershell
spec.description: Execute a PowerShell script and return stdout, stderr, and exit code
spec.implementation_notes: Run the script using powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command <script>. Capture stdout, stderr, and exit code. PowerShell is available on all Windows systems.

request.rationale: Need to perform zlib compression on file bytes. Python is not available (exit code 9009). PowerShell is available on Windows and can use .NET's System.IO.Compression for zlib compression.
